description: Ingestion metadata for the retail lakehouse. One row per source entity. This file is the design-time source of truth; at deploy time the same rows are loaded into the control.ingestion_metadata table (see azure/sql/001_create_ingestion_control.sql) that the ADF metadata-driven pipeline reads.

entities.notes: Master data that changes over time; incremental on updated_at feeds the Silver SCD Type 2 build.
Catalog carries updated_at, so incremental is used to avoid reloading the full catalog each run.
Small, slowly-changing reference table with no change timestamp; a full load each run is cheaper than maintaining a watermark.
Append-oriented transactional table; order_timestamp is monotonic at insert and used as the watermark.

The current source contract has no change/insert timestamp on order_items, so it cannot be loaded incrementally without one. Full load is used until the Azure source exposes an updated_at (or order_timestamp propagated from orders); the target Azure source contract should add such a column to enable incremental loading.
Append-only event stream; event_timestamp is the natural watermark.
